items.title: Base Endurance Run
items.description: Run 8 km at a comfortable pace of 6:30 min/km. Focus on maintaining a heart rate in zone 2 (about 135-150 bpm).

items.title: Strength Training Session
items.description: Perform a full-body weight training session focusing on compound movements. Include 3 sets of 10-12 reps for squats, deadlifts, bench press, and rows. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: After a 10-minute warm-up, do 5x800m intervals at 5:00 min/km pace with 3 minutes of recovery jog between each interval. Cool down for 10 minutes.

items.title: Recovery Run
items.description: Run 5 km at an easy pace of 7:00 min/km. Keep your heart rate below 140 bpm to facilitate recovery.
